home.hero_title_1: Drop off and track your packages in
home.hero_desc: Fill out your request, get an instant quote and a tracking number. Our team validates every shipment before dispatch.
home.step1_text: Pay shipping fees online or at the counter. Apply the provided label to your package.
home.step2_text: Drop off the package at a collection point, or request home pickup.
home.step3_text: Use your tracking number to follow your package progress in real time.
home.step4_text: The package is delivered to the recipient. If absent, a delivery notice is left.
home.service_road_text: Reliable and flexible land solutions at national and continental level.
home.service_sea_text: Economical bulk shipping with full container tracking.
home.service_air_text: The fastest solution for your urgent international shipments.
home.warehouse_desc: Through our logistics and transport projects, we connect continents, bring businesses closer together and facilitate international trade.
home.cta_desc: Create your free account and start tracking your shipments in real time.

footer.company: International transport & logistics. Track your packages in real time across 150+ countries.

about.hero_desc: Since 2018, Youms Logistics has been helping individuals and businesses with domestic and international shipping with precision and innovation.
about.mission_title: Making international transport accessible to everyone
about.mission_desc1: Youms Logistics was born from a simple conviction: international package shipping should be simple, transparent and affordable. Our platform allows anyone to submit, track and manage their shipments with confidence.
about.mission_desc2: From Perpignan to the whole world, we provide our logistics expertise, partnerships with the best carriers and cutting-edge technology for an unparalleled tracking experience.
about.m1_text: Youms Logistics founded in Perpignan, specializing in European road transport.
about.m2_text: Launch of maritime freight services to Africa and Asia.
about.m3_text: Addition of express air freight with global coverage.
about.m4_text: Launch of the real-time tracking platform.
about.m5_text: Integration of route simulation and smart notifications.
about.v1_text: Every package is handled with the utmost care. We guarantee the safety of your shipments.
about.v2_text: Your satisfaction is our priority. Our team is available 24/7 to assist you.
about.v3_text: Present in 150+ countries, we connect continents and facilitate international trade.
about.v4_text: High quality standards at every step, from drop-off to final delivery.

contact.hero_desc: A question, a quote request or need assistance? Our team responds within 24 hours.
contact.consent: I accept the terms of use and privacy policy.
contact.sent_desc: Thank you for your message. Our team will respond within 24 hours.
contact.error: An error occurred. Please try again.

register.title: Create an account
register.subtitle: Join us and start shipping
register.error_password_length: Password must be at least 6 characters.
register.success_desc: A confirmation email has been sent to
register.success_desc2: Please verify your account to sign in.

services.title: Transport solutions tailored to every need
services.desc: Whether it's an urgent domestic shipment or large-volume sea transport, Youms Logistics has the right solution for you.
services.road_desc: Reliable and flexible land solutions for your domestic and European shipments. Modern fleet, real-time GPS tracking and controlled lead times.
services.sea_desc: Economical bulk shipping by sea. Ideal for non-urgent international shipments with excellent value for money.
services.air_desc: The fastest solution for your urgent international shipments. Global air network with guaranteed delivery times.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.desc: Find quick answers to your questions about our transport and tracking services.
faq.no_results: No questions found for your search.
faq.q1: What types of packages do you accept?
faq.a1: We transport all types of packages: general goods, documents, auto parts, fragile items, electronics.
faq.q2: How do I track my package?
faq.a2: Go to the "Track shipment" page and enter your tracking number.
faq.a3: We operate in over 150 countries worldwide.
faq.a4: It depends on the transport mode: road (2-4 days in Europe), air (24-48h worldwide), sea (2-6 weeks).
faq.q5: How do I create an account?
faq.a5: Click "Create an account" from the home page.
faq.a6: After submission, your package goes to "Pending" status. Our team reviews and approves or rejects it.
faq.q7: What happens if there's a delay?
faq.a7: Delays are automatically notified via email and in your client dashboard.
faq.a8: Yes, we have warehouses for temporary or permanent storage.

legal.cgu_a1: These Terms of Service define the terms and conditions under which Youms Logistics makes the site and its services available to users, as well as the rights and obligations of the parties.
legal.cgu_a2: Any user of youmslogistics.com acknowledges having read and accepted these Terms without reservation. Use of the services implies full acceptance of these Terms.
legal.cgu_a3: The site youmslogistics.com allows users to:
legal.cgu_a3_li1: Publicly track a package via its tracking number
legal.cgu_a3_li2: Submit a package registration request (registered users)
legal.cgu_a3_li3: Manage and track shipments from a personal dashboard
legal.cgu_a3_li4: Estimate shipping costs via a simulator
legal.cgu_a4: Account creation is required to submit and track packages. Users must provide accurate information and maintain the confidentiality of their credentials.
legal.cgu_a5: Personal data collected is processed in accordance with GDPR. For more information, see our
legal.cgu_a6: All site content (texts, images, logos, graphics) is the exclusive property of Youms Logistics or its partners and is protected by applicable intellectual property laws.
legal.cgu_a7: Youms Logistics strives to ensure the accuracy of information published on the site. However, it cannot guarantee the absence of errors and declines any responsibility for damages resulting from site use.
legal.cgu_a8: Youms Logistics reserves the right to modify these Terms at any time. Users will be informed of any substantial changes.
legal.privacy_collect: We collect the following data when using our services:
legal.privacy_collect_li1: Identification data: full name, email address, phone number
legal.privacy_collect_li2: Package data: shipping and receiving addresses, weight, dimensions, descriptions
legal.privacy_collect_li3: Navigation data: IP address, pages visited, session duration
legal.privacy_legal: Processing of your data is based on the performance of the service contract and, where applicable, your consent (newsletter, cookies).
legal.privacy_duration: Your personal data is retained for the duration of your account and for 3 years after the last login.
legal.privacy_rights: In accordance with GDPR, you have the following rights: access, rectification, erasure, portability, objection and restriction of processing. Exercise your rights by contacting privacy@youmslogistics.com.
legal.cookie_what: A cookie is a small text file placed on your device when visiting a website. It allows your browser to be recognized and certain information to be remembered.
legal.cookie_types_li1: Essential cookies: necessary for site functionality (authentication, session)
legal.cookie_types_li2: Analytics cookies: help us understand how you use the site
legal.cookie_types_li3: Preference cookies: remember your choices (language, theme)
legal.cookie_manage: You can manage your cookie preferences at any time via your browser settings. Disabling certain cookies may affect site functionality.
legal.cookie_third: We use OpenStreetMap for map display, which may place cookies in accordance with its own policy.
